title: Collegium recommends 10 advocates for appointment as Punjab and Haryana High Court judges
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended the appointment of 10 advocates, including three women lawyers, as judges of the Punjab and Haryana High Court.The decision was taken at a meeting of the Collegium on Monday. The lawyers recommended for the judgeship are:(i) Monica Chhibber Sharma;(ii) Harmeet Singh Deol;(iii) Puja Chopra;(iv) Sunish Bindlish;(v) Navdeep Singh,(vi) Divya Sharma;(vii) Ravinder Malik;(viii) Pravindra Singh Chauhan;(ix) Rajesh Gaur; and
